result:
Implemented note history browsing and browser restore in the web UI.

The web app now supports `GET /notes/{id}/history` and `POST /notes/{id}/history/restore`, reusing the existing snapshot storage and restore logic in [main.go](/home/changkun/null-codex/main.go). I added a shared `restoreNoteVersion` helper, a history view model/diff helper, route parsing for history and restore, and a `History` button on note pages. The rendered page now shows saved versions, lets you select a version to inspect its diff against the current note, and restore it with one click.

I also added HTTP tests for browsing history and restoring a selected version in [main_test.go](/home/changkun/null-codex/main_test.go).

I could not run `go test ./...` because `go` is not installed in this environment (`/bin/bash: go: command not found`).
